transcript.clean_text: what can a highlights of stage 14 in the 2019 Tour de France here on GCN racing let's start by looking back at yesterday julien ala philippe ripped up the script for this year's Tour de France again in the POE time trial not only do defend his lead he extended it with a blistering ride to take the stage and a power slide to celebrate he had many reasons to do so beating Guerin thomas by 14 seconds and thomas de Ghent by 36 he's certainly not gonna give up this jersey easily and he goes into today's stage and leading Geron thomas by one minute and 26 with Steven cries bike at two minutes and at 12 stage 14 we head to the high mountains 111 kilometers from tarp taking the leg loosen of cote de l'homme but male a cat 4 before the climbing proper starts with the category one called a su law but it's the 87th visit to one of the Giants of the pyrenees the cold a tormal a that awaits a mountain top finish 19 kilometers with an average gradient of 7.4 percent attacks encounter attacks galore as many big names fought to get into the breakaway of the day vincenzo nibali being one it's a three-week investment to win the green jersey and Pettis again knows this better than anyone and he was keen to get into the move Nibelungs again were very much the instigators of today's breakaway more attacks though came from the peloton behind and it would be 15 riders that formed the break of the day and included the likes of Leonard camera king of the mountains leader Timbaland Zachary and Maharaja cameras on and the best place Gilmartin 9 to down on alle Philippe TiVo Pinos sent William Bonney to the front Palmer FDJ while the yellow jersey sat in front of on Rick masse with five kilometers to go to the summit of the col de su lor the breakaway was starting to fracture on the steeper slopes of the mountain Pettis again was losing ground in the company of Marte Maharaj it was time for movi star to show their hand and they did so early taking over control of the peloton with Quintana and Pinot both well-positioned with four kilometers to go to the top this year's Tour de France was going from bad to worse for Roman day as he lost contact with the back of the group getting into the early breaks and sweeping up the mountain points before the fight for the GC begins is the perfect tactic for a polka dot Jersey Challenger and tim wellens took 20 points over the top of the sioux law but movie stars they were leading 143 behind the break a demon descendant nearly created a little distance on the descent but this trio would regroup in the valley the green jersey of sagon had dropped back to the peloton but he still had his eye on the points available towards that mile fair still in pursuit was a current sanchez karma Jhansi card and kamna trying to get back up towards the front of the race business as usual though behind as a gang got his points and a ma b star were looking on the sleep in control but were they using up too many riders too early in the stage the next man to try his hand was wrong with C card he went solo with 27 kilometers to go it would have been a tall order to go all the way to the finish today as a breakaway and II believe Ellen's and canna Wilmot up with 23 kilometers to go always the battle OJ's Bear fought his way back to the front this breathtaking shot though from above the Col de tournay goes some way to do it justice this climb is a beast let's crush the hopes and dreams of many into history it wasn't long before J's Berg pressed on alone as behind in the peloton Amador was chatting with Celaya Valverde with Paul was just behind Adam Yates had been in trouble on the SU law and lost contact again early on the tour Millay along with Patrick Conrad who originally lost contact due to a mechanical Jay's bear was finally caught which was now led by Mark solare the back however their teammate cantana was in trouble getting dropped by their pace making of his own team so who were they riding for it wasn't long though before Warren Boggy tried his hand at the front it wasn't long ago that he was the darling of the French and he went off in search of a stage victory so at the back of the bus ala Philippe was still climbing with the best of them could he defy the doubters by staying there to the finish the former Tour de l'avenir winner David God who picked up the pace on the front with this acceleration court pass bargain Richie Porte was losing ground just ahead so too was on rick mass the 22 year old guru is a climbing sensation ramping up the pressure for coupe armored FD che with his work done it was over to Lawrence the Palouse and George Bennett who took over for young boy bhisma Bennett's ferocious pace shed foggy bull sang and I ran and it was a select group that still remained at the front but perhaps some names we weren't expecting and the my adjourn was still fighting on with the flam Rouge almost in sight Emanuel but winds acceleration put Garin Thomas into difficulty and he started to slide off the back along with Bennett as we headed to the summit still in contention with Pino Krawczyk burnout Buckman ala Philippe and Lander an acceleration from Pinot though and he started to ride away it was a phenomenal effort and the Frenchman was heading towards a memorable stage win at the top of one of the most iconic mountains in the Tour de France I love Philippe's well French hearts further taking second place just ahead of cries Mike Buckman and burn out with Lander not far behind fighting to limit their losses Dover Rigoberta all ran with Geron Thomas just behind it it was 30 seconds loss for Iran worth the defending champion a further six behind 29 Tino is definitely looking more and more like a tour for the home nation as Pino takes his third career Tour stage victory confirmation of your stage result Pino takes it from ala Philippe and cries out with Buckman burnout Lander around thomas boggy and full sangha top ten they can start to believe further allophonic defies the critics and he now sits at the top two minutes and two ahead of thomas with cries like at two minutes and a fourteen just how far could he go in this year's Tour de France Stage 15 is another mountaintop finish 185 kilometers from the move to fort out be the stage is peppered with climbs the cat to colder Montsegur before the cat wands port de lair the moody pillock where and the eleven point eight kilometer mountain top finish to what what doubt be whatever you do don't miss it this Tour de France is turning into a classic don't forget to
